stemHtml: Consider only the wing and tail moments of an aircraft. How will the following changes affect the relationship between C<sub>M</sub> and Alpha?

options.a: Moving the tailplane aft and increasing the surface will increase the negative CM for a given AoA.
options.b: Moving the wing forward will have the same effect as moving the tailplane aft.
options.c: Moving the tailplane forward and decreasing the surface will increase the positive C<sub>M</sub> for a given AoA.
options.d: Increasing the wing area will decrease the C<sub>M</sub> variation with AoA.
